quotes:
The three approved brand colors in hierarchy order are: (1) 
#00529B Deep Blue (dominant), (2) 
#FAA31B Amber Orange (secondary accent), (3) 
#FFC60A Golden Yellow (tertiary accent).

The three approved brand colors in hierarchy order are: (1) 
#00529B Deep Blue (dominant), (2) 
#FAA31B Amber Orange (secondary accent), (3) 
#FFC60A Golden Yellow (tertiary accent).

rules.intent: Maintain established brand color dominance hierarchy.
rules.rule_text: The brand colors must follow a strict hierarchical order of usage: (1) Deep Blue (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529B) as dominant, (2) Amber Orange (color.primary.sunshine = #FAA31B) as secondary accent, and (3) Golden Yellow (color.primary.gold = #FFC60A) as tertiary accent.

quotes:
Agenda, is the primary headline font
and should be used for all headlines and headers.

Nunito Sans should be used for
all body copy in print.

Agenda, is the primary headline font
and should be used for all headlines and headers.

Nunito Sans should be used for
all body copy in print.

rules.intent: Ensure distinct brand typographic pairing and readability hierarchy.
rules.rule_text: Agenda (font.family.agenda) is the primary headline font and must be used for all headlines and headers, while Nunito Sans (font.family.nunito_sans) must be used for body copy.

quotes: use this shape and treatment for CTAs:

<svg width="180" height="59" viewBox="0 0 180 59" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M0 25C0 11.1929 11.1929 0 25 0H177.5C178.605 0 179.5 0.895431 179.5 2V33.5C179.5 47.3071 168.307 58.5 154.5 58.5H2C0.895433 58.5 0 57.6046 0 56.5V25Z" fill="url(#paint0_linear_75_5202)"/> <defs> <linearGradient id="paint0_linear_75_5202" x1="0" y1="29.25" x2="179.5" y2="29.25" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse"> <stop stop-color="`#FFDF55`"/> <stop offset="1" stop-color="`#FAA21B`"/> </linearGradient> </defs> </svg>

rules.intent: Maintain precise styling consistency for the banner CTA elements.
rules.rule_text: CTAs in banners must apply the exact asymmetric shape path and linear gradient fill spanning from SVG Yellow (color.cta.svg_yellow = #FFDF55) to SVG Orange (color.cta.svg_orange = #FAA21B) as detailed in the technical SVG definition.
